name: Zurich Segway guided tour public
description: Discover Zurich Segway guided tour public in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Zurich Segway guided tour public in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Segway
subcategory.description: Book a tour with the Segway and explore the city. With the maneuverable Segway, you can get to many places on a guided city tour that would not be accessible with a tour bus. At the same time, the visited radius is much larger than on a city tour on foot. The minimum age to ride a Segway in Switzerland is 14 years.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Segway Tour in Zurich: Experience an exciting city tour on the Segway in summer.
Segway Tour Zurich: Group on an exciting tour through the city with friends and team. Experience pure adventure.
Segway Zurich: Experience the city tour with friends and family in front of the Dolder Grand
Segway Tour Zurich: Experience exciting adventures in groups and discover the city in summer.
